author: anon-295fd0bb
content: Plan: Add crosslink prune command. 1) Add Prune subcommand to CLI in main.rs. 2) Create commands/prune.rs with hub and knowledge branch pruning. 3) Use git orphan branch rewrite (checkout --orphan, commit current tree, force-update branch). 4) Stale data cleanup for heartbeats/locks/events. 5) Flags: --dry-run, --keep-commits N, --hub-only, --knowledge-only, --force.
